title: Smoked Bacon Onigiri
description: A fusion of Japanese and American flavors, these onigiri are filled with crispy smoked bacon and wrapped in a savory rice ball.
instructions: Rinse the rice thoroughly and cook according to package instructions.
In a pan, cook the smoked bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Cut the cooked bacon into small pieces and set aside.
Mix the cooked rice with intense soy sauce and grated daikon radish (if using).
Shape the rice mixture into small triangles or rectangles.
Place a small amount of cooked bacon in the center of each triangle.
Fold the triangle in half over the bacon to form a triangle shape.
Gently press the edges together to seal the onigiri.
